description: Letter in Hebrew to all congregations, mentioning David, “Head of All Diasporas of Israel.” Directions on verso in Arabic script, mostly lost. (Information from Goitein's index cards.) Also in his handwriting (or part of the same letter?): T-S 12.257 + T-S AS 145.278 + T-S K25.209. And T-S 6J5.1 EMS. ASE.
description_he: מכתב עברי לכל הקהילות, המזכיר את דוד 'ראש כל גליות ישראל'. הנחיות בצד ב' בכתב ערבי, רובן אבדו.
